context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Add e.stopPropagation() to prevent location button clicks from also triggering the map's click-to-move handler. Replace the subtle .error class flash with a visible showToast() notification that tells the user why geolocation failed.
implementation: Added a showToast() helper that creates a toast element inside #toast-container, auto-dismisses after 5s, and uses CSS animation. Updated handleGetLocation to accept the event, call stopPropagation, and invoke showToast on both geolocation-unavailable and permission-denied cases. Also added a title tooltip to the button.
